creator: vlada@devnull.cz
text:
A bug was found in ipv6gen-0.9, new version contains the bug fix.

Fix: 

Please update the ipv6gen port with version 1.0.

The location is the same, only name and checksum of the tarball has changed.

Just bump the PORTVERSION in ports/net-mgmt/ipv6gen/Makefile to 1.0 and change the ports/net-mgmt/ipv6gen/distinfo to contain the following:

MD5 (ipv6gen-1.0.tgz) = 798d8f01fe7a3c005ddd14d0f009fdbc624e477c
SHA256 (ipv6gen-1.0.tgz) = 8d5239d3f3c508b00d68182ae4f4403bda1428ef222d7a28e192fd678db4858a
SIZE (ipv6gen-1.0.tgz) = 12952

Thanks,


v.
